prompt: Edit the source image(s) to achieve this goal: Upgrade a clean packshot into a premium campaign still without changing the product identity. Subject: frosted glass skincare bottle — cylindrical, silver cap, centered label, minimal design; standing still on a tabletop surface; front-facing with slight three-quarter cap turn. Scene: studio tabletop product setup, contemporary, studio controlled, currently matte gray, to be replaced. World logic: the bottle silhouette and front-facing label must remain exact, the new background may influence color bounce but not geometry, the tabletop reflection and shadow anchor should remain believable. Composition: product hero still, centered bottle with comfortable breathing room, eye-level to product shoulder, 90mm lens feel, sharp focus on label plane with soft falloff behind, static studio setup, negative space: clean upper area for possible campaign wordmark, aspect ratio 1:1. Lighting: key light: large soft top-front source maintaining premium packshot clarity, fill: restrained frontal return, rim: narrow teal edge from back right, clear studio air, material response: frosted glass diffusion, satin paper label, brushed silver cap, neutral key with jewel-toned rim accent. Style stack: photoreal, product, instagram-post, clean premium photography, quiet luxury, palette: emerald, silver, soft neutral white, luxury skincare advertising traits: restrained reflections, calm spacing, premium material emphasis. Preserve exactly: exact bottle silhouette, cap alignment, label geometry and text, camera angle and crop, tabletop reflection, shadow footprint. Change only: replace matte gray background with wet emerald marble, add narrow teal rim light from back right, keep the overall lighting premium and controlled. Mask hint: background replacement should avoid touching bottle edges or label plane. Delta priority: preservation first, environment second, lighting accent third. Must include: label fully readable, premium jewel-toned backdrop, controlled reflections. Avoid: bottle geometry drift, extra props, warped label text, masterpiece, award-winning. Accessibility: clear object-background separation.

thinking_config.note: Use chat/session history for multi-turn edits so thought signatures are preserved by the SDK.

metadata.provenance: Gemini-generated or Gemini-edited output; SynthID watermark expected for generated images.
notes: Strict product preservation and label fidelity need a careful edit path.

references.notes: wet emerald marble surface inspiration only
